testcase.name: test_cell_phones_products_listed

error.message: failed on teardown with "AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'encode'"

testcase.error: conftest.py:71: in screenshot_on_failure driver.save_screenshot(path) C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python314\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\remote\webdriver.py:896: in save_screenshot return self.get_screenshot_as_file(filename) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python314\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\remote\webdriver.py:873: in get_screenshot_as_file png = self.get_screenshot_as_png() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Roaming\Python\Python314\site-packages\selenium\webdriver\remote\webdriver.py:904: in get_screenshot_as_png return b64decode(self.get_screenshot_as_base64().encode("ascii")) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'encode'
